introSection: Lil' Dipper is a wooden hybrid kiddie roller coaster located at Camden Park in Huntington, West Virginia, USA. Lil Dipper is one of two roller coasters in the park built by National Amusement Device Company. It is one of three surviving roller coasters built by the company.
fullText: Lil' Dipper is a wooden hybrid kiddie roller coaster located at Camden Park in Huntington, West Virginia, USA. Lil Dipper is one of two roller coasters in the park built by National Amusement Device Company. It is one of three surviving roller coasters built by the company.
